description.value:
Receive Medication prescription afleverlocatie building blocks for patient M. XXX_Nederveen
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 9 Afleverlocatie Afleverlocatie
Receive Medication prescription afleverlocatie resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '199311') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '179051') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '199311') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '179051') ))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '199311|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (MODAFINIL TABLET 200MG)
